speaker: speaker1
text: Can I borrow this magazine from you ? It's really interesting and I can't put it down .

speaker: speaker2
text: I am sorry , but I can't lend it to you now , for I haven't finished reading it . If you don't mind , I can lend you some back numbers to you .

speaker: speaker1
text: That would be very kind of you . By the way , is it a monthly magazine ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , it is a fortnightly . So , you see , I can get the new one quite soon .
